raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX ) A tour from XXXX in XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX was requested for Sunday, XX/XX/XXXX and it was cancelled on Wednesday, XX/XX/XXXX. The tour operator 's policy states that cancellations must be made at least XXXX hours in advance to get a refund. 

XXXX ) When we arrived on XXXX XXXX XXXX on Sunday, XX/XX/XXXX, we were informed that the itinerary had changed including XXXX XXXX moving from Sunday, XX/XX/XXXX to Wednesday, XX/XX/XXXX. I reached out to the local tour operator on Sunday, XX/XX/XXXX via e-mail to inquire if anyone was available on Wednesday. I did not get a response on Sunday. I did not get a response on Monday. As a follow up, I sent an e-mail Monday evening to cancel the reservation if they could not confirm XXXX hours in advance. Finally, XXXX XXXX on Tuesday, the tour operator responded and said that the change had been made. By then, we had made alternate plans. 

XXXX ) The tour operator 's policy states that " any changes made less than XXXX hours before the experience 's start time will not be accepted. '' Obviously, notification of the change was less than XXXX hours before the start time.
